topics.name: 100 - 200 Level: Principles of Management and Business Environment
topics.description: BUS 101 Introduction to Business, BUS 201 Principles of Management, and Business Environment.

subtopics.name: BUS 101 & BUS 201: Fundamentals of Business and Management
objectives: Understand evolution of management thought (Taylor, Fayol, Weber) and management functions
Analyze political, economic, socio-cultural, and technological (PEST) business environment in Nigeria

topics.name: 300 Level: Organizational Behavior, Marketing, and Human Resource Management
topics.description: BUS 301 Organizational Behavior, Marketing Management, and Human Resource Management.

subtopics.name: BUS 301 & MKT 301: Organizational Behavior and Marketing
objectives: Analyze individual behavior, group dynamics, motivation theories (Maslow, Herzberg), and leadership styles
Apply 4 Ps of marketing mix (Product, Price, Place, Promotion) and market segmentation

subtopics.name: HRM 301: Human Resource Management
objectives: Execute manpower planning, recruitment, selection, performance appraisal, and industrial relations

topics.name: 400 Level: Strategic Management, Corporate Governance, and B.Sc. Project
topics.description: BUS 401 Strategic Management, Business Policy, International Business, and Thesis.

subtopics.name: BUS 401: Strategic Management and Business Policy
objectives: Perform SWOT analysis, Porter's Five Forces analysis, and formulate corporate strategies
Understand corporate governance, business ethics, and corporate social responsibility (CSR)

subtopics.name: BUS 499: Final Year Business Research Project
objectives: Conduct empirical business research and present undergraduate research defense
